services_supported: heating and cooling systems for commercial buildings
integration_constraints: Emergency HVAC calls must be flagged as priority in ServiceTrade
after_hours_flow_summary: Needs someone answering calls 24/7 for emergencies. Non-emergencies can be scheduled next day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Non-emergencies like maintenance, filter changes, tune ups can be scheduled next day.
questions_or_unknowns: How to represent Saturday business hours (9am-2pm) within the single start/end fields, given current representation is Monday-Friday (8am-6pm)?
notes: Client requires 24/7 call answering due to brutal summer AC emergencies in Texas heat.
